## 发布检查 / Publishing Checklist

- [ ] PR 已直接创建为 Ready for review，除非用户明确要求 Draft。
      The PR is created as ready for review unless the user explicitly asks for a draft.
- [ ] PR 标题使用中英双语，中文在前，英文跟随。
      The PR title is bilingual, with Chinese first and English following.
- [ ] PR 正文、CHANGELOG 和面向协作的文档更新保持中英双语。
      The PR body, CHANGELOG, and collaboration-facing documentation updates are bilingual.
